resolved_blockers.resolution: Installed formalism-registry-reconciliation.v1.json, changed the effective GCAT-BCAT state to crosswalked, synchronized classification posture, and updated the validator to compute effective state while preserving the v0.1 base record as provenance.
Repaired KPT semantic aliases, removed legacy cohort double counting, and replaced duplicate-name index validation with canonical registry/sidebar/union coverage.

resolved_blockers.observed_failure: The docs registry's 38 records included two internal ecosystem records, while the validator compared all 38 against only the union's 36 external frameworks.
resolved_blockers.resolution: Validator now requires exact 38-record registry/union parity, validates 36 external and two internal records separately, and prohibits internal records from framework-specific sidebar placement.

external_gates.required_resolution: Observe a canonical workflow run at or after the latest repair commit and inspect its uploaded full-validation report.
Continue source-confirmed theorem, proof, fixture, expected-outcome, reference-implementation, and peer-review extraction without promoting mirrors, translations, or baseline tests into proof claims.

next_action: Observe the repaired canonical workflow, then begin the Glossary consistency and terminology-governance audit while source-authority proof and implementation gates remain separately open.
